<summary>找到FY2024 Q4链接(/detail/257/)，提取同店销售数据</summary>



```python
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
import re

headers = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36'}

# 访问FY2024 Q4财报 (Fiscal 2024 = 2023年10-12月)
url = "https://ir.flooranddecor.com/news-events/press-releases/detail/257/floor-decor-holdings-inc-announces-fourth-quarter-and"
r = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=15)
soup = BeautifulSoup(r.text, 'html.parser')

# 提取文本
text = soup.get_text()

# 找same-store或comparable相关数据
lines = [l.strip() for l in text.split('\n') if 'same' in l.lower() or 'comparable' in l.lower()]
for line in lines[:15]:
    print(line)

# 提取百分比
percents = re.findall(r'(-?\d+\.?\d*)%', text)
print("\nAll percentages found:")
for p in percents[:20]:
    print(p + "%")
```🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**

所以FY2024 Q4 (Fiscal 2024, 覆盖2023年10月至12月)的同店销售增长率为 **-0.8%** (下降0.8%)
